feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Business One Integration Framework - Exchange Rates
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,
Hope you're doing well.

I'm implementing in one of the clients the exchange rates package of SAP B1 Integration Framework.

I have done all the configurations and i'm connecting sucessfully with ECB webservice.
This is my parameter mapping (followed the documentation of the scenario) :

And this is my preview XML:

Altough everything seems ok, when integrating with sap business one I got this message:

By the documentation this error could be related with missing ISO codes, wich I fullfilled in the Database:

Can anyone help me finding what i'm doing wrong ?

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,
Tiago Gonçalves

entry.title: Unable to find checkbox Without Qty Posting under A/R Invoice form in SAP Business One 10.0
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am unable to find the checkbox Without Qty Posting under A/R Invoice form (in Item row in Contents tab) while choosing Transaction Type as GST Debit Memo in SAP Business One 10.0. Could someone suggest how to make it appear in Item row?

entry.title: SAP B1 – Default Contact Name for New Business Partners
entry.content:
Is it possible to have a predefined default name automatically created in the "Contact Persons" tab for every new Business Partner record?

 

Thanks, Maurício.

entry.title: Service call module update date and create time into UTC format of MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss query
entry.content:
Hello experts.

I am needing to get the service call module update date & time (table OSCL) into a single column in the format of 'MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss' and then have it converted to UTC. Ultimately, I will be using this query in a Boyum P&D Report Action. I have seen posts before (but cannot find now) where the SQL function STUFF() was used but I know that each of those examples were for marketing document tables. Please direct me to those posts if I am mistaken.

The OSCL table does not record time with seconds, therefore the max number in characters/numbers in the time fields will be 4 (i.e., 1344 for 13:44, instead of ORDR's 134423 for 13:44:23).

I am able to perform the query below in MS SQL as well as the SAP B1 query editor when the time field has at least 3 characters (e.g., on or after 1am) but the FORMAT function fails when it is less than 3.

Is possible to query for the update date & time (or the create date & time) into a single column without having to perform a case statement to evaluate the length of time field (which could be from 1 - 4 characters long [2 for 00:02 and 932 for 09:32 and 1748 for 17:48])? 

FORMAT(CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), OSCL.UpdateDate, 101)+' '+FORMAT(OSCL.UpdateTime, '##:##')) AT TIME ZONE 'Eastern Standard Time' AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss')

 Thank you in advance for any assistance you can provide.

entry.title: BoM using 3rd party during manufacturing process
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I would be interested in hearing your solutions for an issue we have?

We have a BoM established which requires a 3rd party to perform a service as part of the manufacturing process.

Example:

Step 1. Raw steel frames are manufactured (with complete BoM)

Step 2. This is sent to Galvanisers to perform a service.

Step 3. Galvanised product is returned for completion of final stage of manufacturing. (BoM)

How would you capture the complete cost of the manufactured product (BoM for raw steel frame, plus galvanising, plus finishing BoM)?

Thank you all very much for your support

entry.title: UDF in Expanded SC not showing all to a specific superuser
entry.content: In SAP Business One 10.0, Profit and Loss Statement - Selection Criteria > Expanded > User-Defined Fields, not all UDFs are not showing a specific user even if the user is a super user and have professional license. It is a unique case when all superuser can view all. Please help me troubleshoot it. Thank you

entry.title: HSN Code wise report SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear all,

I need a query based report which gives output HSN wise summary report. 

HSNCode, Docentry with fields HSNCode , BaseAmt , IGSTAmt , SGSTAmt , CGStAmt, Tax %

Report include two document : AR Invoice and AR Credit note

SAP Business One #HSN #SAP B1

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Cross tab sums different when summing the same field via insert summary
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am having this issue where a value in a cross tab is not summing up a formula field correctly. 

 

Cross tab sum is giving these values

It should actually be these values 

I double checked all the fields, and the formula field adds up correctly when inserting a summary. I did this to check. Any ideas where the summing could be going wrong. The formula field for the crosstab has if statements, but even if I remove all and just leave the relevant one to the data I am testing, it is giving two different amounts. 

Thanks all,
Jerusha

entry.title: Vendor Refund for AP Down Payment – Best Practice in SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We are looking for guidance on how to handle the following scenario in SAP Business One:

An AP Down Payment Invoice was processed, and an Outgoing Payment was made to the vendor. Later, the vendor refunded the amount (either partially or fully).

As the down payment is already closed due to the outgoing payment, we are unable to generate an AP Credit Memo against it. This is blocking us from properly reflecting the vendor refund in the system.

What is the recommended way to handle such a vendor refund in SAP Business One?

Any guidance or shared experiences would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Need to run system status report multiple times in order to use the support user.
entry.content:
Hi All,
We have a few companies are using the Support user in all of them. Initially, we had to run the System Status Report in RSP before we could log into the companies. RSP was running weekly, but still had to run the SSR for each company individually and upload it before we could log in the companies.

The SSR in RSP runs weekly, last one ran on 04/06/2025. Today when I had to log into the various companies, I had to run the SSR again before I could log into each company. 
Is it suppose to work like this. Had anyone experienced this as well.

We are on version 10.0 FP2208
RSP: 3.2 PL19

Thank you all,
Jerusha

entry.title: Text Field with more than characters
entry.content: In standard sap business one forms, the text field or any udf fields does not allow more than 255 characters. But my clients requires in marketing documents like P0 ,a field that they can use for terms and condition which is more than 255 chars. How can I achieve it please.

entry.title: b1LogConfig.xml mandatory parameters
entry.content:
I'm trying to load a feature pack  but the wizard is returning this

I don't know how to get around this. Help!

 

Simon.

entry.title: Auditoria Stock - cantidad acumulada cero con valor acumulado (SAP B1 10 Hana)
entry.content:
Estimados Expertos:

Tengo un caso al momento de sacar el reporte de auditoria de stock ya que me muestra un valor acumulado cuando la cantidad es 0 en el ALM99, tengo el mismo caso en dos articulos mas pero primero quisiera saber si esto es algo normal y cual seria la explicacion para ello y como se puede ajustar esa valor. El problema aparentemente es en diciembre del año pasado pero recien a saltado en abril osea si saco los reporte de auditoria y stock valorizado hasta marzo 2025 han cuadrado exactamente ambos pero en abril recien salto la diferencia, haciendo el analisis vemos que el problema se ocasiona en diciembre 2024 veo una transferencia con cant acumulada 0 pero con el valor que es la diferencia que queremos ajustar o saber como hacerlo

Que pruebas hemos realizado:

Sacar todo el scock y volverlo a ingresar

Revalorizar 

Crear salidas y entradas

Por favor el apoyo de algun experto que me pueda ayudar

Gracias a todos de antemano

entry.title: Stock Audit - Accumulated Quantity Zero with Accumulated Value (SAP B1 10 Hana)
entry.content:
Dear Experts:

I have a case where when I run the stock audit report, it shows an accumulated value when the quantity is 0 in ALM99. I have the same case with two other items, but first, I would like to know if this is normal, what the explanation would be, and how this value can be adjusted. The problem apparently started in December of last year, but it only appeared in April. That is, if I run the audit report and the stock valued until March 2025, they both match exactly, but the difference only appeared in April. Analyzing this, we see that the problem occurred in December 2024. I see a transfer with a cumulative amount of 0, but with the value, which is the difference we want to adjust or know how to do it.

What tests have we performed:

Remove the entire score and re-enter it

Revalue

Create outputs and inputs

Please seek the support of an expert who can help me

Thanks in advance, everyone

entry.title: Item groups running with different valuation method SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi ,

We have managed our company settings FIFO valuation method into SAP and all items are managed by item groups. In item group there are default valuation method option is available where few items groups selected as a Moving Average and few items groups selected as a FIFO.

How items are working here? It is good to convert moving average to FIFO ?

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Requirement to Include "From Date" and "To Date" in Trial Balance & Excel Export - SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi,

We require that the "From Date" and "To Date" selected while generating the Trial Balance report in SAP Business One be explicitly included as fields/values in the Excel output.

Currently, while exporting the Trial Balance and other Financial reports to Excel, the selected date range is not visible in the output file. This creates difficulty when reviewing or sharing the report, as there is no direct reference to the reporting period in the exported document.

Regards,

Akshay

entry.title: How to create a Dropdown List Variable to prefilter an SAPB1 User Query?
entry.content:
Hi all. I'm trying to figure out if it's possible to create a user query that uses a predefined list of options/values, which dependent on the option picked, will filter the query data on output.

To give a basic example, the OITM table and its ItemCode and OnHand fields. On execution, I want the Selection Criteria to provide a single input, being a dropdown list of the strings "ALL", "POS", "NEG", and "ZERO". Depending on which option is picked by the user, the returning query data would be the ItemCode and OnHand columns for items where the OnHand value is > 0, < 0, or = 0 (with "ALL" applying no filtering to the data).

I know that this can be done within the query preview using the filter table option, but I want to implement a preset filtering in the query from the start, as to potentially reduce the number of returning rows so the query doesn't take as long to generate.

This here was my initial attempt based on the resources I could find about this topic, but it didn't work (and I feel like the '/Dropdown/' syntax isn't correct here either):

SELECT T0.ItemCode, T0.OnHand
FROM OITM T0
WHERE
([%0/Dropdown/ALL,POS,NEG,ZERO] = 'ALL')
OR ([%0] = 'POS' AND T0.OnHand > 0)
OR ([%0] = 'NEG' AND T0.OnHand < 0)
OR ([%0] = 'ZERO' AND T0.OnHand = 0)

Any help here would be highly appreciative. Thanks!

entry.title: Issue in Service Layer's Script Engine (.... has been blocked by CORS policy.)
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am using SAP HANA Service and Script Engine with flutter web application.
When I call the Service Layer API, I used withCredentials=true so the dio save cookies set by response header.
I can use all types of Service Layer API and it works.
But when I try to use Script Engine API in my code it give error related to CORS.
The Script Engine URL
/b1s/v1/script/{{partner name}}/{{script name}}

The Error:
localhost/:1 Access to XMLHttpRequest at 'https://hanaserver:50000/b1s/v1/script/ABC/ReceiveFG' from origin 'http://localhost:8080' has been blocked by CORS policy: No 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header is present on the requested resource.

If I set withCredentials=false in my application, then all Service Layer API get fails and flutter application also does not allow to set B1SessionID cookie in the request.

Does anyone have any solution for this?

Thank you.

Manish

entry.title: The sales analysis selects the material delivery note result, which does not show the amount
entry.content:
The sales analysis selects the material delivery note result, which does not show the amount
I tested the same system in different companies and found that the amount couldn't be displayed. It seems that some Settings are incorrect, but I couldn't find it, so I asked where to set it.

entry.title: SAP B1 Crystal Report
entry.content:
Can anyone guide me on how to make my Crystal Report layout dynamically expand to additional pages based on the amount of text in a field? In my Purchase Order form, I have a UDF field for Terms and Conditions, which can contain a long text input from the user. However, when I place this UDF in the Report Footer, nothing is displayed if the text is too long.

What I want is for the Terms and Conditions to display properly even if they are very long and to continue onto the next page(s) if needed. Ideally, I also want page numbers to reflect this.

Please help me figure this out. I’ve attached a visual to better explain my issue.
